name: prabala
description: Prabala – Open Source Keyword-Driven Automation Framework for Web & Desktop

scripts.build:packages: npm run build -w packages/core && npm run build -w packages/reporting && npm run build -w packages/cli
scripts.build:web: npm run build -w packages/studio-server && npm run build:web -w studio
scripts.dev:studio: concurrently "npm run dev:server" "npm run dev:web -w studio"
